backups.warning: Stop the battlegroup before taking or restoring a backup. Backups taken while the game is running may be inconsistent, and a restore requires the battlegroup stopped.

take.title: Take Backup
take.desc: Snapshot the battlegroup's PostgreSQL database to a timestamped file on the host. Recommended before risky changes.

backups.restoreConfirmDesc: This replaces the live database with {{name}}. The battlegroup must be stopped — this cannot be undone.

schedule.title: Backup Schedule
schedule.desc: Run automatic backups on a weekly schedule. Times are in the configured timezone.
schedule.noRules: No rules yet — add one below.

serverHealth.title: Server Health
serverHealth.subtitle: Live VM, battlegroup, and port status.

restarts.title: Scheduled Restarts
restarts.noRules: No rules yet — add one below.

director.title: Director Config
director.subtitle: Battlegroup Director settings — map instancing & advanced tunables (AMP).
director.unsupported: Director config editing is only available on the AMP control plane.
director.restartNote: Changes are written to director_config.ini and take effect after a server restart.

landsraad.title: Landsraad
landsraad.subtitle: The weekly political term — decrees and the house task board (read-only).
landsraad.decreesDesc: Server-wide buffs that can be elected each term.
landsraad.taskBoardDesc: House contribution tasks for the current term.

app.changesNote: Changes on all tabs are saved together.
app.title: DUNE ADMIN
app.updateAvailableBody: A new version is available: v{{current}} → v{{latest}}.

backendUnreachable.body: The web app loaded, but it couldn't connect to the dune-admin backend. Make sure the dune-admin executable is running and reachable from this browser.
backendUnreachable.hint1: Make sure the dune-admin service/executable is running on the server.
backendUnreachable.hint2: Check that the backend URL above is correct and reachable (host, port, firewall, HTTPS).
backendUnreachable.hint3: Behind a proxy or on a different host? Set the backend URL in Settings.
backendUnreachable.title: Can't reach the dune-admin backend

bases.featureNotAvailableDesc: This version of the dune-admin binary does not support base listing. Upgrade to the latest release to use this feature.
bases.subtitle: Live in-world player bases. Export any base as a solido-compatible blueprint.

actions.backupMsg: Create a database backup? This may take a few minutes.
actions.restartMsg: Restart the server? Players will be briefly disconnected.
actions.restoreMsg: Restore database from backup? This will overwrite current data.
actions.stopMsg: Stop the server? All players will be disconnected.
actions.updateMsg: Run a server update? This takes the server offline briefly.

battlegroup.initWarning: Server just started — game servers may still be initializing (~2 min).

restore.dropzone: Drop or click to upload a .backup or .zip from your computer
restore.noBackups: No backup files on server yet.
restore.title: Restore from Backup
restore.warning: This overwrites current data. Server should be stopped first.

importModal.dropzone: Drop or click to upload a .json blueprint file
importModal.title: Import Blueprint

blueprints.subtitle: Manage saved base blueprints. Export or import player constructions.

database.runHint: Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to run · Tab accepts suggestion

liveMap.betaBody: This feature is under active development. Some functionality is still changing and may not be final.
liveMap.calibActive: Calibration mode — click on the map exactly where your character is standing.
liveMap.calibNoPlayer: No online player to anchor calibration to.
liveMap.calibPoints: {{n}} point(s) captured — needs 2+, far apart, to solve.
liveMap.densityNoneSelected: Enable resource types above to see their density.
liveMap.dragTeleportDesc: Safe-snap to ({{x}}, {{y}}) — player will land on nearest valid ground.
liveMap.subtitle: Players, vehicles and bases on the live map
liveMap.teleportModeActive: Click the map to set destination
liveMap.title: Live Map
liveMap.unsupported: Live map is not available on this server.

logs.noCheatEvents: No cheat events found in the last 7 days.
logs.selectFromPanel: Select a {{label}} from the left panel to start streaming logs.

actions.dormantHint: Bot disabled — enable it in the Server tab to use lifecycle controls.
actions.wipeListingsDesc: This deletes every active Revy listing on the exchange. Player listings, fulfilled-order history, and Revy's Solari balance are untouched. The next list tick will repopulate listings from the catalog.

configEditor.buyThresholdDesc: buys a listing only when its price is at or below this % of the bot's reference price. 100% = match or below · 70% = 30%+ discount required · 110% = up to 10% above bot price.
configEditor.configSaved: Config saved — changes apply on next tick
configEditor.gradeMultipliersDesc: Scales the listing price by quality grade. Grade 0 (Standard) is the base and should stay at 1.0.
configEditor.limitsDesc: Controls how many items the bot buys and lists each tick.
configEditor.listingsPerGradeDesc: active listings maintained per item per quality grade (0 = Standard … 5 = Flawless). Stackables use grade 0 only. Example: 5 × 6 grades = up to 30 listings per gradeable item.
configEditor.rarityMultipliersDesc: Applies to items with no NPC vendor price and to crafted Unique/Memento gear. Keyed by rarity; Common (1.0) is the baseline. Grade multipliers stack on top.
configEditor.vendorMultipliersDesc: Applies to items that have an NPC vendor price (most items). Listing price = vendor price × this multiplier, keyed by rarity. Only one of Vendor or Rarity applies to a given item.

disabledItems.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or template ID…

log.backendUnreachable: Could not reach backend — check that it is running.
log.wsError: WebSocket connection failed — the log stream was interrupted.

serverConfig.changesNote: Changes require a server restart to take effect.
serverConfig.savedConfig: Server config saved — restart required to apply changes

market.noBotConnected: No market bot connected — enable the built-in bot to manage it here
market.subtitle: Browse active exchange listings from bot and player sellers.
market.title: Market Board

admin.deleteTutorialsConfirmDesc: This will remove all tutorial completion records for {{player}}.
admin.dismissReturningDesc: Marks the award as claimed so the login popup stops appearing
admin.kickDesc: Disconnects the player from the server
admin.liveActionsDesc: RabbitMQ commands — player must be online.

manageLocationsModal.addHint: Enter a name and coordinates, then Save. Saving an existing name updates its coordinates. Leave Z blank for ground level (0).
manageLocationsModal.noLocations: No locations yet — add one above.
manageLocationsModal.title: Manage Locations

mapPickerModal.hint: Click anywhere on Hagga Basin to capture X/Y. Z defaults to {{z}} — adjust manually if needed.
mapPickerModal.title: Pick Location on Map

admin.resetProgressionConfirmDesc: This will wipe XP, skills, and journey progress for {{player}}. This action cannot be undone.
admin.resetProgressionDesc: Wipes XP, skills and journey for the player
admin.spawnVehicleDesc: Player must be online. Spawns at the chosen partition location.
admin.teleportNote: Live if online · written to DB if offline
admin.wipeCodexConfirmDesc: This will clear all codex discoveries for {{player}}.
admin.wipeInventoryConfirmDesc: This will destroy all items in {{player}}'s inventory. This action cannot be undone.
admin.wipeInventoryDesc: Destroys all items in the player's inventory

contracts.desc: Applies the contract's AddedFlagsOnCompletion tags + tier-promotion side effects. Multi-select supported.
contracts.title: Complete Contract(s)

experimental.customScriptDesc: Try any script name or console command.
experimental.knownScriptsDesc: Named scripts defined in DefaultGame.ini. Fire-and-forget.

scripts.LeaveMeAloneDesc: Destroys all NPCs, clears encounters + sandstorms, disables sandworm (server-wide)
scripts.PlaytestSetupAdminDesc: ⚠ DESTRUCTIVE — same as Playtest Setup but uses raw template names
scripts.PlaytestSetupDesc: ⚠ DESTRUCTIVE — ResetProgression + CleanInventory, then full gear kit
scripts.UnlockAllAbilitiesDesc: Sets all ability modules to level 1
scripts.UnlockAllSkillsDesc: Sets all skill tree modules to level 1

experimental.warning: ⚠ Experimental — these commands are sent via RabbitMQ but their effects are unverified. Use on test characters only.

journey.title: Journey Nodes
journey.wipeAllDesc: This will delete all journey progress for {{player}}. This action cannot be undone.

a_new_beginning.desc: Main story intro — crafting Stillsuit, harvesting resources, fabricator research. Unlocks early game.
a_new_beginning.name: Complete: A New Beginning

act1_complete.desc: A New Beginning + Find the Fremen combined. Player starts ready for Act 2.
act1_complete.name: Complete: All of Act 1

deep_desert_intro.desc: Completes the Deep Desert side quest chain.
deep_desert_intro.name: Skip: Deep Desert Intro

find_the_fremen.desc: All 7 trials, the Sietch, and Epilogue. Unlocks the Fremkit (Stillsuit, Thumper, Cryss Knife, etc.) and completes Act 1.
find_the_fremen.name: Complete: Find the Fremen (Trials of Aql)

overland_intro.desc: Completes the Overland map side quest chain (Hark Landsraad missions, keystones).
overland_intro.name: Skip: Overland Map Intro

skip_npe.desc: Marks the tutorial/NPE as complete. Useful for experienced players who don't need the intro.
skip_npe.name: Skip NPE (New Player Experience)

unlock_all_lore.desc: Reveals all Dunipedia entries: Known Universe, Landmarks, Manual of the Friendly Desert, War for Arrakis.
unlock_all_lore.name: Unlock All Lore (Dunipedia)

vermillius_intro.desc: Completes all Vermillius Gap tutorial quests (research, crafting, exploration). No tag side effects — pure tutorial skip.
vermillius_intro.name: Skip: Vermillius Gap Tutorials

progression.progressionUnlockDesc: Completes DA_FQ_ClimbTheRanks journey nodes and writes faction tier tags.
progression.quickPresetsDesc: Curated bundles that complete one or more root journey nodes and cascade to all children + tags.
progression.resetSkillTreeDesc: This will wipe the full {{trainer}} job skill tree for {{player}}.
progression.reverseUnlockDesc: This will undo the {{preset}} preset for {{faction}} and remove associated tags from {{player}}.
progression.unlockMainQuestDesc: Flips every DA_MQ_<name>.* journey row complete and applies the m_TagsToAdd union.
progression.unlockTrainerDesc: Completes every Trainer_X_* contract and grants the full job skill tree.

resources.charXPNote: Max 344,440 (level 200) · live if online, DB if offline
resources.fillWaterNote: Fills all water containers to max (player must be online)

specs.onlineWarning: ⚠ Player is online — XP changes may not take effect until they reconnect
specs.resetKeystonesDesc: This will remove all granted keystones for {{player}}. This action cannot be undone.
specs.resetSpecDesc: This will wipe all XP and levels for the {{track}} specialization track.

detail.sessionHistoryEmpty: Session data accumulates as players log in. The tracker polls every 5 minutes.
detail.solarisHistoryEmpty: Solaris snapshots are written every 5 minutes while players are online.
detail.xpHistoryEmpty: XP snapshots are written every 5 minutes while players are online.

givePacks.duplicateId: A pack with that ID already exists.
givePacks.noItemsYet: No items in this pack yet.
givePacks.noPacks: No packs yet — add one above.
givePacks.noPackSelected: Select a pack to edit its items.
givePacks.title: Manage Give-Items Packs

inventory.deleteOnlineWarning: Player is online — deleting items may cause inventory desyncs. Continue?
inventory.repairGearDone: Repaired {{repaired}} of {{scanned}} gear pieces — relog to see in-game
inventory.repairGearNone: No gear needed repair ({{scanned}} items scanned)
inventory.repairNotice: Durability changes are written to the DB. Player must relog to see updated values in-game.
inventory.title: Inventory

vehicles.repairDone: Repaired {{repaired}} modules on {{label}} — relog to see in-game
vehicles.repairNotice: Vehicle repairs require a server restart to take effect in-game.
vehicles.repairPartial: Repaired {{repaired}} of {{total}} modules on {{label}} ({{skipped}} skipped) — relog to see in-game

server.advancedCategoriesDesc: Click a category to expand it in place. Click again or pick another to switch.
server.commonSettingsDesc: The dozen or so knobs admins reach for most often. Everything else lives in the categories below.
server.iniNotFound: Could not locate server INI files: {{error}}. For kubectl, ensure the game server PVC is mounted. For docker/local, add server_ini_dir to ~/.dune-admin/config.yaml.
server.rawIniDesc: Array entries (+key=val) and unrecognised keys, grouped by INI section.
server.showAllAriaLabel: Showing all settings — click to show user settings only
server.showUserAriaLabel: Showing user settings only — click to show all
server.title: Server Settings
server.expertCategoriesDesc: Engine and system internals. Change these only if you know exactly what you're doing.
server.ampManagedTooltip: Managed via the AMP API — applied on the next server restart

adv.backendUrlHint: Only needed when the UI is served from a different host (SSH tunnel, CDN). Leave blank for single-binary setup.

amp.useContainerHint: Disable to run on host as the AMP user directly.
amp.apiHint: AMP Web API login. Lets dune-admin manage server settings under AMP so they survive restarts. Default port 8081.

broker.execPrefixHint: when broker is inside a container
broker.optionalHint: Enables capture and notifications when configured.

control.modeHint: How dune-admin manages the game server
control.selectMode: Select a control mode above to see mode-specific settings.

ssh.hostPortHint: enables SSH tunnel for all DB + exec

storage.selectContainer: Select a container to view its contents
storage.warningText: Items added to or removed from storage containers require a server zone restart to become visible to other players.

welcome.configSubtitle: Enable grants, set active packages and configure the welcome message.
welcome.enabledHint: — grants the active package to online players who haven't received that version.

message.enabledHint: Sent once per player per active version via the GM persona. Tracked in the grants ledger.
message.enabledLabel: Send whisper to new players on first login
message.messagePlaceholder: Welcome to the server! Enjoy your starter pack.
message.senderPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the seeded GM persona
message.title: Welcome Message

welcome.noItemsYet: No items in this version yet.
welcome.noPackageSelected: No package selected. Add a version to start.
welcome.packagesSubtitle: Build and manage item packages. Each version can be granted independently.
welcome.retryCleared: Cleared — will re-attempt on the next scan
welcome.savedEnabled: Enabled — granting "{{version}}" within one scan tick
welcome.title: Welcome Kits
